name: Fairgrounds Tennis Complex
description: Fairgrounds Tennis Complex is a place to play pickleball in Hutchinson, KS. There are 3 outdoor courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Haven Sports Complex
description: Come play pickleball at Haven Sports Complex in Hutchinson, KS! There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to lights.

name: Hutchinson Community College
description: Hutchinson Community College is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hutchinson, KS. There are 2 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include lights.

name: Hutch Rec Senior Center at Elmdale Park
description: Hutch Rec Senior Center at Elmdale Park is a place to play pickleball in Hutchinson, KS. There are 2 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Journey Activity Center
description: Journey Activity Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Haven, KS. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to lights.

name: Memorial Hall
description: Memorial Hall is a place to play pickleball in Hutchinson, KS. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free.
